summary:
Main
Dalian iron ore futures trended stronger today amidst vola lity. The benchmark I2605 contract ul mately closedat 822.5 RMB/tonne, represen ng an increase of 0.92% compared to the previous trading day. In the physical market, prices rose by 6-9 RMB/tonne.
